candidates.observable_statement: ThermaLoop Systems announced a multi-year supply agreement with an infrastructure integrator serving large-scale AI data center deployments.
candidates.capital_flow_implication: Capital inflow into ThermaLoop's manufacturing operations from the integrator.
candidates.physical_implication: Sustained production ramp over the coming quarters.

candidates.observable_statement: The agreement covers liquid cooling modules and related systems across multiple planned deployment phases.
candidates.capital_flow_implication: Investment in expanding manufacturing capacity for cooling modules.
candidates.physical_implication: Ramp up production, potential new facilities.

candidates.observable_statement: Management stated that the agreement is expected to support a sustained production ramp over the coming quarters.
candidates.capital_flow_implication: Capital inflow to ThermaLoop's production and capital outflow from the integrator.

candidates.observable_statement: Frontier Separation Holdings announced a financing package to support construction and commissioning of a domestic rare earth separation facility.
candidates.capital_flow_implication: Capital is flowing into the construction of a rare earth separation facility, indicating investment in domestic rare earth processing capacity.
candidates.physical_implication: Construction of a new rare earth separation facility.

candidates.observable_statement: The package will fund equipment purchases.
candidates.capital_flow_implication: Capital is directed toward procurement of specialized equipment for rare earth separation.
candidates.physical_implication: Purchase of equipment for the facility.

candidates.observable_statement: The package will fund site development and process-line installation.
candidates.capital_flow_implication: Capital is directed toward physical development of the facility site and installation of process lines.
candidates.physical_implication: Site development and installation of process lines for the rare earth separation facility.

processed_results.rejection_reason: No plausible directional capital-flow implication can be inferred from the artifact alone.
